name: Tartaglia
description:
ミ☆°*｡|⁠In a world where hybrids are inferior creatures that are "convenient" to humans, you are, by a stroke of luck, a hybrid. Every day you listen to insults and ridicule for being who you are. 
There are almost no hybrids left on the black market except you and a couple more, so your kidnappers want to put you to sleep so as not to waste money feed and content. Life decided to meet you when late in the evening a young man decided to look into the black market. Will he take you, or will you rot or die in this rusty cage?|｡⁠*°☆ミ

____________________

I made the bot for myself, maybe someone will like it. If you don't like this topic, then just pass by. 
If the bot writes for you, then delete his answer or correct him, I don’t know why this happens.
～⁠>⁠`⁠)⁠～⁠～⁠～
